g.text: no approved swatch, no deliverables - a hard dependency at the top of the pipeline
palette contract - the shared colour vocabulary
6 colours - 3 light, 3 dark - one approval signature
columns, rows, accent bars - all reference the swatch classes
title, subtitle, decorative imagery tinted via fg-1 + opacity
gradient bar from accent-1 to accent-2
cards wired with chamfered L-routes and fan connectors
series colours injected from the approved palette at render time
approve the swatch first - every card, banner, flow, and chart downstream inherits those exact hexes
